text: In this setting, I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The glass, the clean lines, the focus on 'R+D'—research and development—speak of progress and possibility. The world outside these walls recedes and my mind turns to innovation, to the ways we humans attempt to connect and coexist with the future we create. I feel alert, intrigued, but also somewhat dwarfed by the impersonal efficiency of it all.
